title: CIT Manager
description: Gives you a client-side manager to see all of your installed CIT packs.
body:
Inspired by CIT List

Use this instead of trying to remember every rename your CIT resource packs add!

CIT Manager reads your resource packs for textures that provide custom models upon renaming a vanilla item. This menu can be opened in-game or by going to Mod Menu's config and finding this mod.

![In-game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1062cd8bdddac504d48fa066393eac7a9f4d73f.png)

*

Features; 

Adds a smart grouping system. Instead of showing 100 entries for a single name under several items, it shows you a single CIT texture and all items it can be applied to.

|

The "Copy Name" button adds the ability to copy the name of the item to your clipboard and paste it into an anvil and voila!

|

Alternatively, for creative players or people with commands, you can press "Give Command" and it will pull up a seperate screen for you to choose which item you want to get from the rename. Example; Clicking this button while having "Blue Anakin" selected will show you "Diamond Sword", "Iron Sword", "Netherite Sword", and "Shield".

|

My favorite feature; literally my favorite feature lets you pin CITs to the top for you to access on the fly.

*

Default key to open is "J"

Please report any bugs

![Mod Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de74ae32202f38e9fa611ee0c17ed8b1088f9a12.png)
Requires Mod Menu

![Fabric API](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/35e58134796dc14f9b0c2501f553f0e28c503fb2_0.webp)
Requires Fabric API


![CIT Resewn](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/423123599f0fcca48ee88cbb8d22a42ca6a02c92_0.webp)
Requires CIT Resewn
